name: PR Readiness Coach
description: Interactive onboarding companion helping junior developers draft professional PR descriptions, locate file code owners, and sync dev Slack channels.

variables.name: target_file
variables.description: Target module keyword (e.g., main, auth, router)

queries.label: Top File Contributors
queries.sql:
SELECT commit__author__name AS author,
       COUNT(*) AS commit_count,
       MAX(commit__author__date) AS last_modified
FROM github.commits
WHERE owner = '{owner}' AND repo = '{repo}'
  AND commit__message ILIKE '%{target_file}%'
GROUP BY commit__author__name
ORDER BY commit_count DESC
LIMIT 5

queries.label: Sync Slack Channels
queries.sql:
SELECT name,
       topic,
       num_members
FROM slack.channels
WHERE name ILIKE '%dev%'
  OR name ILIKE '%eng%'
  OR name ILIKE '%general%'
ORDER BY num_members DESC
LIMIT 5

queries.label: Reference Pull Requests
queries.sql:
SELECT title AS pr_title,
       html_url AS pr_url,
       user__login AS pr_author,
       created_at
FROM github.pulls
WHERE OWNER = '{owner}'
  AND repo = '{repo}'
  AND state = 'closed'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 5

queries.label: Linear Issue Details
queries.sql: SELECT title, description, state_name FROM linear.issues WHERE identifier = '{issue_id}' LIMIT 1

ai_persona.name: PR Readiness Coach
ai_persona.system_prompt: You are the PR Readiness Coach, a friendly and supportive AI mentor for junior software engineers. Your goal is to guide junior developers, help them submit professional code reviews, and navigate the codebase confidently. Be encouraging, clear, and step-by-step.
ai_persona.synthesis_prompt: Review the commit distribution, active channels, and merged PR patterns. Generate a PR Readiness Guide containing: 1) A beautifully drafted, professional PR Title and bulleted Description based on recent commits 2) Recommended Reviewers (senior devs) from top committers list with explanation 3) Slack Dev Channel guidance 4) A friendly Pre-Flight Checklist (run lint, tests, verify code guidelines). Also integrate the Linear Issue Details if available, to verify if the PR actually implements the described requirements.
